recommendations.title: Insurgent
recommendations.overview: Beatrice Prior must confront her inner demons and continue her fight against a powerful alliance which threatens to tear her society apart.

recommendations.overview: Due to a genetic disorder, handsome librarian Henry DeTamble involuntarily zips through time, appearing at various moments in the life of his true love, the beautiful artist Clare Abshire.

recommendations.overview: A recently slain cop joins a team of undead police officers working for the Rest in Peace Department and tries to find the man who murdered him.

recommendations.title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
recommendations.overview: Humanity finds a mysterious object buried beneath the lunar surface and sets off to find its origins with the help of HAL 9000, the world's most advanced super computer.
